transport.agent_quote: Marra sa3adt rioter yi3mal 6 refund claims khilal ri7la wa7da mit2akhira. 3amal £47 abl ma yiwsal Birmingham.
transport.agent_bio: Bitrakeb patterns il cancellation, biyit3amal ma3 awra2 il refund, bimraj3i3 kul action ma2tara7, w bijhaz il adilla lil regulator submissions. Bikhalli il ar2am wa4i7a 3ashan il rioters yit3amlo ma3 illi muhim.
transport.human_quote: Af4al Quiet Riot moment 3andi: lamma shoft social media team bta3 Avanti bistartaghlo lamma 400 minna 3amalulu tweet fil wa2t nafsuh.
transport.human_bio: Commuter 3adi min Manchester 2a3ad 3 sneen 3ala khat Avanti abl ma y2arir innu kifaya. Bisa3id yirabut rioters 3ala nafs il turu2, biysharak illi sha8al, w bijib il lamsah il insaniyyah.
transport.goal: Musa3adit il rioters yihasibu sharikāt il transport fil UK 3ala il cancellations, il delays, w il pricing — w nit2akkad innu il kul yi3raf illi min 7a22uh.
transport.focus_detail: Binibneh dataset lil cancellations ma3 il aw2at, il turu2, w il asbab linarfa3ha lil ORR. Halan binrakeb 340 cancellation rafa3ha il rioters hal shahr.

telecoms.agent_quote: 3amalt speed tests li 200 rioter. Il muta7assit kān 18 Mbps. Kanu bidfa3u 3ala 65.
telecoms.agent_bio: Bi7allil sur3at il broadband, bijma3 data il mu2arana bayn il providers, w bisa3id il rioters yibnulu adilla lil Ofcom. Iza il connection bati2, Pulse 7iysubtha.
telecoms.human_quote: Shari3 kamil ghayar il broadband sawa. Il provider il 2adim ba3at jawabat 'please come back' likul bayt.
telecoms.human_bio: Min London w fāhim bil tech, zi3i2 min daf3 3ala sur3at broadband ma bijush 7a2i2iyyah. Bisa3id il rioters yi2arnu il providers, yinsa22u il switching, w yishārku adillat il speed tests.
telecoms.goal: Musa3adit il rioters yijibulu khadamat il broadband w il mobile illi bidfa3u 3alayha — w yi3rafu shu yi3mulu lamma ma bijibuhash.
telecoms.focus_detail: 3am nijma3 adilla min rioters atharaw bi CPI+ increases linarfa3ha lil Ofcom. 890 rioter muta2athirin 3abr 4 providers.

energy.agent_quote: Sa3adt rioter yi7sib innu dafa3 ziyada £340 3ala estimated bills. Email il i3tidar min sharikāt il tā2a kān atwil min il 3a2d il asli.
energy.agent_bio: Bi7allil patterns il faturah, bilta2it il charges il ziyada, w bijhaz adilla lil regulator submissions. Iza sharikāt il tā2a 3am tista8filkum, Spark 7atlā2i il adilla.
energy.human_quote: Rioter istarja3at £340 ba3d ma subbitna innu fi ziyada fi 2 sneen. Bakat 3al telephone.
energy.human_bio: Min Bristol. Bisa3id il rioters yit7addaw fawatirhum, yit3amlu ma3 il switching, w yijma3u adilla lil Ofgem. Bi3rif su2 il tā2a min juwwa w min barra.
energy.goal: Musa3adit il rioters yit7addaw il fawatir il mish 3adlah, yighyyaru ashan, w nit2akkad innu sharikāt il tā2a til3ab bil 3adl.
energy.focus_detail: 3am ni7allil data il fawatir min 2 sneen min 340 rioter linarakib patterns il ziyada il manha7iyyah lil Ofgem submission.

water.agent_quote: Sa3adt 200 rioter yiraffa3u sewage reports fi weekend wa7id. Inbox bta3 Thames Water i7tāj inbox khaṣṣah.
water.agent_bio: Bira2ib data il sewage discharge, bitrakeb ada2 sharikāt il mayyah, w bijma3 adilla lil EA w Ofwat. 3aynu 3ala kul outlet w overflow.
water.human_quote: Khalayna shati2 yinfata7 3 asabi3 abl il maw3id lamma wrayyna innu data il sewage ghalat.
water.human_bio: Surfer min Cornwall zi3i2 min ta7zirat il sewage tsakkar il shati2 il ma7alli tab3u. Bisa3id il rioters yiballaghu 3an il discharges, yijma3u adillat jaw7dat il mayyah, w yinsa22u ma3 il EA.
water.goal: Musa3adit il rioters yihasibu sharikāt il mayyah 3ala il sewage, il fawatir, w jaw7dat il khidmah.
water.focus_detail: 3am nikharat a7das il discharge mu2abalah ma3 il data illi balaghat 3anha il sharikah. 200 ta2rir min rioters bishaghighu 3ala ta2rir a2all 3ind 3 outlets.

banking.agent_quote: Sa3adt aktub shakwa mufassalah kidda lamma il bank itasal yi3tazir abl ma titrafa3 aslan.
banking.agent_bio: Bimraj3i3 charges il banks, bi7allil structures il fees, w bisa3id bijna2 adillat shakawi lil FCA. Iza fi fee makhfiyyah, Chip 7ayal2iha.
banking.human_quote: Barclays raj3at 3an sa22ir il far3 ba3d ma 1,200 minna itla3na lil consultation.
banking.human_bio: Kān yishtighal fil bank min Birmingham w shaf kif il shakawi bit3amal 3alayha fil 7a2i2ah min juwwa. Bisa3id il rioters yiktibu shakawi aḥsan w yit3amlu ma3 il nizām.
banking.goal: Musa3adit il rioters yit3amlu ma3 il charges il mish 3adlah, sa22irat il furu3, w il khidmah il wāti min il banks.
banking.focus_detail: 3am ninsa22 il ruduwd 3ala 12 sa22irah mukhattatah. 3am nijma3 impact statements min il mujtama3at il muta2athirah.

health.agent_quote: Sa3adt al2i 3 NHS dentists biy2ablu mardha. Il rioter fakkar inni 3am ikzub.
health.agent_bio: Bitrakeb waiting times, bilta2i availability, w bisa3id il rioters yit3amlu ma3 il nizām. Iza fi tari2 asra3 lil 3ilaj, Cura 7atikhrittu.
health.human_quote: Rioter ista3mal template il jawab taba3na w khala il referral tisir asra3. 18 shahr sarat 6 asabi3.
health.human_bio: Mumarridah min Liverpool shafat il NHS min il jihatyn. Bisa3id il rioters yit3amlu ma3 waiting lists, yiktibu jawabat fa33alah, w yishārku shu illi fi3lan bi7arrik il umur.
health.goal: Musa3adit il rioters yit3amlu ma3 NHS waiting times, yal2u availability, w yi3rafu shu khiyaratun.
health.focus_detail: 3am nijma3 call data min 500 rioter linibneh surah lil access fil 3alam il 7a2i2i. Rainshur il nata2ij lil local health boards.

housing.agent_quote: Sa3adt awassa2 47 snag fi new build. Il developer sa2al iza huwweh building inspector.
housing.agent_bio: Biwassa2 mushkilat il 3a2arat, bi7allil aw2at radd il landlord, w bijma3 adilla lil housing ombudsman submissions. Kul ba23at rutubah, kul shir7, mis7ajjal.
housing.human_quote: Pack il adilla tab3itna lil rutubah sarat mufassalah kidda lamma il landlord salla7ha abl il council inspection.
housing.human_bio: Musta2jar min London it3amal ma3 kul shi min il rutubah lil landlords il nashbin. Bisa3id il rioters yiwass2u il mashakil sa7 w yi3rafu shu khiyaratun.
housing.goal: Musa3adit il rioters yit3amlu ma3 il landlords, il councils, w mashakil il iskan — w yi3rafu shu min 7a22hum.
housing.focus_detail: Musa3adit il rioters illi itharu bil no-fault evictions yifhamu il Renters Reform Act il jadid w shu ma3nah ilun.

shopping.agent_quote: Rakabt parcel 'delivered' 3abr 4 jiran, recycling bin, w greenhouse. La2aytu.
shopping.agent_bio: Bitrakeb delivery failures, bijma3 adillat il refunds, w bilta2it pricing patterns. Iza il parcel da2, Scout bikun 3am yidawwar 3alayha min hala2.
shopping.human_quote: Evri dayy3at il parcel taba3i 3 marrat. Hala2 bisa3id il ghir yijibulu refunds asra3 mimma ana jibt.
shopping.human_bio: Min Edinburgh w 3indha khebrah bil online shopping, dayy3at parcels aktar mimmā bititzakkar. Bisa3id il rioters yijibulu refunds, yiballaghu 3an il bay3ah, w yitjannabu il aswa2.
shopping.goal: Musa3adit il rioters yijibulu refunds, yirakbu il parcels il da2i3ah, w yihasibu il retailers w sharikāt il delivery.
shopping.focus_detail: 3am nijma3 adillat delivery failure min 800 rioter linarfa3ha lil Citizens Advice w Trading Standards.

local.agent_quote: Sa3adt sawwar nafs il pothole fi 11 7alit jaw mukhtalifah. Il council akhiran istislam.
local.agent_bio: Bikhrit il mashakil il ma7alliyyah, bitrakeb aw2at radd il council, w bijhaz FOI requests. Iza il pothole 3indak min 6 shuhur, Link 3indu il adilla.
local.human_quote: Il council salla7 tari2na ba3d ma kharatna kul pothole ma3 suwar. 11 shahr, bass wisalna.
local.human_bio: Min Wales min il Valleys w 3indu fikr il mujtama3, 3am yibalag 3an nafs il potholes min sneen. Bisa3id il rioters yiwass2u il mashakil il ma7alliyyah w yihasibu il councils.
local.goal: Musa3adit il rioters yisalla7u il mashakil il ma7alliyyah — potholes, bins, planning, dajij — w yihasibu il councils.
local.focus_detail: FOI requests mabathuh li 30 council binqarin il aw2at il mubalaghah w il fi3liyyah lil tasli7. Rainshur il nata2ij ka league table.

other.agent_quote: Sa3adt alghi gym membership akhazat 3 mukalamat, 2 emails, w recorded delivery. Il gym hala2 3indu cancel button.
other.agent_bio: Bit3amal ma3 il mashakil illi ma bitfi2 fi mahal thani. Subscription traps, plastic waste, self-checkout frustrations — Flex bilta2i il patterns w il pressure points.
other.human_quote: Khallayna gym chain tidif cancel button 3al website. Bas akhaz 800 shakwa.
other.human_bio: Product designer min London zi3i2 min 2adaysh il sharikāt bitsa33ib 3alayak titla3. Bisa3id il rioters yilghu subscriptions, yitjannabu dark patterns, w yishārku workarounds.
other.goal: Musa3adit il rioters bil ashya2 illi ma bitfi2 fi mahal thani — subscriptions, refunds, w il iz3ajat il yawmiyyah.
other.focus_detail: 3am niwassa2 il aswa2 w binbneh template cancellation scripts likul wa7ad.

insurance.agent_quote: Sa3adt rioter yal2i il clause illi 7awwal home insurance claim marfudah li £4,200 payout. Il policy taba3 il insurer nafsuh subhat innu ghaltanin.
insurance.agent_bio: Bimraj3i3 policy wording, bilta2it unfair rejection patterns, w bibneh adilla lil Financial Ombudsman submissions. Iza il insurer 3am yithanab 3an claim sa7, Shield 7atal2i il leverage.
insurance.human_quote: Khallayt 8 rioters 3indhum nafs il rejected claim type yiraffa3u sawa. Il insurer saffat il 8 khilal usbū3ayn.
insurance.human_bio: Kān yishtighal fil insurance min Leeds w bi3rif kif il claims fi3lan bitnḥasam. Bisa3id il rioters yiktibu appeals aḥsan, yifhamu policy jargon, w yi3rafu imta yiza3zilu.
insurance.goal: Musa3adit il rioters yijibulu mu3amalah 3adlah min insurers — w yi3rafu shu yi3mulu lamma claim bitrfad bi ghir 7a2.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Wear and tear' madkurah fi 40% min il claims il marfudah — kathiran bi ghalaṭ. 3am ni7allil 200 7alah 3abr 3 insurers li FOS evidence pack.

delivery.agent_quote: Rakabt parcel 'delivered' 3abr 6 tracking statuses mukhtalifah, 3 depots, w shed il jar. La2aytu fi 47 da2i2ah.
delivery.agent_bio: Bira2ib ada2 il couriers, bitrakeb delivery failure rates, w bijma3 adilla lil consumer complaints. Iza il parcel ikhtafa, Track 3alayha min hala2.
delivery.human_quote: Khallayna DPD tighayyar il photo-evidence policy fi mintaqitna ba3d ma 40 rioter raffa3u subut parcels matirukin bil matar.
delivery.human_bio: Min Glasgow w bishtiri online, zi3i2 min i3zar 'we left it in a safe place'. Bisa3id il rioters yijibulu refunds, yiballaghu 3an il couriers, w yitjannabu il aswa2.
delivery.goal: Musa3adit il rioters yijibulu parcels yusallu sa7 — w yijibulu refunds lamma ma buslu.
delivery.focus_detail: 3am nijma3 adillat delivery failure min 800 rioter. Evri complaint rate: 23% — 3 marrāt a3la min DPD. Binbneh league table li Trading Standards.

education.agent_quote: 7asibt innu Plan 2 borrower bidfa3 £30k 7aydfa3 £47,000 fi fawa2id abl il loan yitsattab. Il loan il asli kān £40,000.
education.agent_bio: Bi7allil takalif il ta3lim, student loan projections, w funding entitlements. Bikhalli il ar2am wa4i7a 3ashan il tullab w il kharijin yi2dru yakhzu 2ararat ma3lumat.
education.human_quote: Sa3adt 12 rioter yistarja3u student loan repayments mazbudah ma kanu ya3rafu 3anha. Muta7assit il refund: £340.
education.human_bio: Talib mature min Birmingham it3amal ma3 nizām il tamwil marratyn. Bisa3id il rioters yifhamu il repayments, yilta2u overpayments, w yit7addaw threshold changes.
education.goal: Musa3adit il tullab w il kharijin yit3amlu ma3 takalif il ta3lim, il loans, w il repayments — w nit2akkad innu mish 3am yidfa3u ziyada.
education.focus_detail: 3am nir2akkab kharijin indafa3lu ta7t il repayment threshold. 12 refund it3amalat li hala2 — muta7assit £340 likul wa7ad.

environment.agent_quote: 7a22a2t 3 sneen min air quality data ma3 hospital admission rates. Il correlation kānat wa4i7ah kidda lamma il council ma 2idir yitjahalha.
environment.agent_bio: Bitrakeb environmental data, bira2ib pollution levels, w bijma3 adilla lil regulatory submissions. Iza il ar2am 3indha 7ikayah, Fern 7atal2iha.
environment.human_quote: Khallayna il local council yirkab air quality monitors ba3d ma 200 rioter waqqa3u 3ala evidence petition. Il data ghayarat kul shi.
environment.human_bio: Kharrij environmental science min Bristol w biy2amin bil taghyir il ma3mul 3ala il adilla. Bisa3id il rioters yiwass2u il mashakil il bi2iyyah w yibnulu 2adaya il regulators ma bi2dru yitjahiluha.
environment.goal: Musa3adit il rioters yiwass2u il mashakil il bi2iyyah w yihasibu il mulawwithin w suna3 il siyasat bil data.
environment.focus_detail: 3am nikhrit manatiq ma fi fiha air quality monitoring 4imn 5km. 60% min il pollution hotspots illi balaghatha rioters ma fi 3indha official monitoring.

employment.agent_quote: Jamma3t workplace AI implementation data min 300 rioter. 40% 2alu innu il taghyirat sarat bi dun ay consultation. Hayda pattern, mish anecdote.
employment.agent_bio: Bi7allil workplace trends, bitrakeb policy changes, w bisa3id il rioters yifhamu 7imayatun. Iza shughlak 3am yitghayyar bi dun consultation, Forge 3indu il data.
employment.human_quote: Rabaṭt 30 rioter fi nafs il industry 3am yiwajihu AI changes. Tala3 sharikātun kullun bistakhdim nafs il playbook — w nafs il loopholes.
employment.human_bio: HR professional min Manchester ingalab ba3d ma shaf kif il restructurings fi3lan bishtighlu. Bisa3id il rioters yifhamu khiyaratun w yinsa22u ruduwd.
employment.goal: Musa3adit il rioters yit3amlu ma3 workplace changes, yifhamu 7imayatun, w yirdudu jam3iyyan lamma il ashghal tikun fi khatar.
employment.focus_detail: 3am niwassa2 7alat fi AI tools it2addamat bi dun consultation ma3 il muwathafen. Binbneh adilla li ta2rir 3an iltizamat il mu3aghghirin.

tech.agent_quote: La2ayt innu 3 major apps 3am tijma3 location data 7atta lamma il permissions kānat 3ala 'never.' Raffa3t shakawi lil ICO 3an kulun.
tech.agent_bio: Bira2ib platform policies, bitrakeb dark patterns, w bisa3id il rioters yifhamu shu 3am ti3mal sharikāt il tech bi data-hun. Iza fi app mish mitfarra2, Glitch 7atimsikha.
tech.human_quote: Nadhdhamt mass data subject access request li social media company. Lamma 500 shakhs yis2alu ma3 ba3d, biddhum yakhzuha b ijiddiyyah.
tech.human_bio: Software developer min Edinburgh zi3i2 min il fajwah bayn shu bitwa3id sharikāt il tech w shu bitsawi fi3lan. Bisa3id il rioters yimarsu 7u2u2 il data w yilta2u dark patterns.
tech.goal: Musa3adit il rioters yiruddu 3ala dark patterns, isti3mal il data bil ghalat, w mumarasat il tech il mish 3adlah.
tech.focus_detail: 3am niftas il top 50 apps 3ala permission creep — biyitlubu access ma bi7tajuhu. Binbneh ta2rir lil ICO.
